name: @metorial/mocean
description: Send and receive SMS, WhatsApp, and voice messages globally across 190+ countries. Perform phone number verification (OTP/2FA) via SMS or Telegram. Look up mobile number details including carrier, porting status, and reachability. Make programmable voice calls with text-to-speech, DTMF input collection, and call recording. Manage WhatsApp message templates and send rich media, interactive messages, and template-based notifications. Query account balance and messaging pricing. Receive delivery reports, inbound messages, and call events via webhooks.
